JUDGEPROTEM:ARNOLD EVYE CLERK:SUE ELLEN SMITH CSR:BELDON YEE SETT.AGMT: PLTF SHALL HAVE POSS'N OF PREMISES AT 1139 MARKET #252, SF, CA. DEF. FORFEITS LEASE. MONEY DAMAGES OF $1163.66 PAST DUE RENT; $22.86 PER DAY UD DMGS; & $96 COURT COSTS. IF DEF. AGREES TO MAKE RENT PAYMENT OF $150 ON 7/17/01, WITH MINIMUM PAYMENT OF $50 TOWARDS BACK RENT, ON EVERY TUESDAY THEREAFTER, THEN BOTH PARTIES AGREE TO STAY ENTRY OF JUDGMNT PURSUANT TO ABOVE TERMS. IF DEF. DEFAULTS ON ANY PAYMENT, JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED FORTHWITH. DEF. WAIVES ANY STAY OF EXECUTION OR ANY RELIEF FROM JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILLER, MARCUS L. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1139 MARKET ST # 252, SAN FRANCISCO $1,236.22 RENT, $96.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,332.22, LEASE FORFEITED
